zh.Horsmonden, Kent, Eng: 英國英格蘭肯特霍斯蒙登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dennice A Parke於1539年出生在英國肯特霍斯蒙登時，她的父親Dennis Parke14歲，母親Sarah Parke14歲。她於1566年與Robert Doggett在英國英格蘭肯特霍斯蒙登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年5月13日在她的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國肯特霍斯蒙登。

zh-hans.Horsmonden, Kent, Eng: 英国英格兰肯特霍斯蒙登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dennice A Parke于1539年出生在英国肯特霍斯蒙登时，她的父亲Dennis Parke14岁，母亲Sarah Parke14岁。她于1566年与Robert Doggett在英国英格兰肯特霍斯蒙登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年5月13日在她的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国肯特霍斯蒙登。

nameMeanings.name: Parke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Park  . This form of the surname is common in Ireland.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: Dennice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Dennice A Parke was born in 1539, in Horsmonden, Kent, England, her father, Dennis Parke, was 14 and her mother, Sarah Parke, was 14. She married Robert Doggett in 1566, in Horsmonden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 13 May 1594, in her hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Horsmonden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dennice A Parke est née en 1539, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Dennis Parke, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Sarah Parke, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Doggett en 1566, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 mai 1594, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dennice A Parke 1539 in Horsmonden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dennis Parke 14 und ihre Mutter Sarah Parke 14. Sie hat 1566 in Horsmonden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Robert Doggett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Mai 1594 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Horsmonden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dennice A Parke è nata il nel 1539 nel Horsmonden, Kent, England, sua padre, Dennis Parke, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Sarah Parke, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Robert Doggett nel 1566, nel Horsmonden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 maggio 1594, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Horsmonden, Kent, England.

ja.Horsmonden, Kent, England: イギリスケントホールスモンデン
ja.Horsmonden, Kent, Eng: イギリスイギリスケントホールスモンデン
ja.lifeSummary: Dennice A Parkeが1539年にイギリスケントホールスモンデンで生まれた時，父Dennis Parkeは14歳，母Sarah Parkeは14歳であった。1566年にイギリスイギリスケントホールスモンデンでRobert Doggettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年5月13日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスケントホールスモンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dennice A Parke(이)가 1539년 영국 켄트 호르스몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dennis Parke(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Parke(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1566년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 호르스몽에서 Robert Doggett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 5월 13일 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 호르스몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dennice A Parke nasceu em 1539, em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Dennis Parke, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Parke, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Doggett em 1566, em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de maio de 1594, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dennice A Parke родилась в 1539 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Dennis Parke было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Parke, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Doggett в 1566 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 13 мая 1594 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dennice A Parke nació en 1539, en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Dennis Parke, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Sarah Parke, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Robert Doggett en 1566, en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de mayo de 1594, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra.
